  1. io.bloviate.util

Uses of Record Class
io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils

Packages that use SeededRandomUtils
Package
Description
io.bloviate.gen
 
io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
 

  • Uses of SeededRandomUtils in io.bloviate.gen

    Fields in io.bloviate.gen declared as SeededRandomUtils
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected SeededRandomUtils
    AbstractDataGenerator.randomUtils
    A reusable SeededRandomUtils view over AbstractDataGenerator.random, created once per generator so subclasses don't allocate a fresh wrapper on every generate() call.

  • Uses of SeededRandomUtils in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc

    Methods in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc with parameters of type SeededRandomUtils
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    TPCCUtils.nonUniformRandom(int a, int c, int min, int max, SeededRandomUtils randomUtils)
    The TPC-C non-uniform random function NURand (clause 2.1.6): NURand(A, x, y) = (((random(0, A) | random(x, y)) + C) % (y - x + 1)) + x.
